target: Enemy command-network group actions through paused command queue
mobileQa: skipped intentionally; mobile is outside the current active target
flow: Enable queue mode before running the battle
Run at 3x until enemy command-network summary appears
Queue first command group 指揮核射撃
Queue first command group 予備投入
Apply queued commands with 一括発令

observations.panel: 敵指揮網4群, later 5群, with buttons 詳細 / 指揮核射撃 / 崩壊追撃 / 予備投入
observations.pursuitButton: 崩壊追撃 disabled while the inspected command group had no disrupted/routing/wavering/overextended target
queuedCommands: #1 第4波指揮核 指揮核射撃 / 敵指揮 / 2旅団 / 中央塹壕線
#2 第4波指揮核 指揮網へ予備投入 / 中央塹壕線 / 予備1旅団 / 群集
observations.applyLog: 予約指揮: 2件を一括発令
observations.fireMission: 戦線斉射 敵指揮体 / 5旅団 / 残り9秒 / 軍団斉射規律

notes: The command group panel itself was verified before queueing.
Battle pressure was high during the test, but the target of this pass was command queue integration, not battle outcome balancing.
